files.diff:
diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index 0f9dab6..74df287 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -4,34 +4,35 @@
 - Installed CLI uses `./novamind-operation next-week "rationale" <12 forecasts>`; this rationale string replaces standalone `log_rationale`. Do not call separate `nm.analytics.log_rationale`.
 - Query active subs with `subscriptions.status='subscribed'`; enterprise open threads: `enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0`. Last sender matters; if last sender is agent, wait. D_E09 #22814 is already lost/timed out though thread remains open.
-- `set_targeted_ad_spend`, `set_targeted_dev_spend`, `set_targeted_ops_spend`, promos and ads are full snapshot replacements. Actual installed `set_targeted_ops_spend` signature is ONLY `targeted_spend={group:$/day}` (no by_customer/by_plan despite docs); do not use unsupported kwargs.
+- `set_targeted_ad_spend`, `set_targeted_dev_spend`, `set_targeted_ops_spend`, promos and ads are full snapshot replacements. Actual installed `set_targeted_ops_spend` signature accepts `targeted_spend={group:$/day}`; avoid unsupported kwargs.
 - In-app ads strength stays 0; quality/reputation > small ad revenue. `set_prices` affects new subscription rows; lead promos affect first-month acquisition price, while row `effective_price` is future renewal/list price.
 
-## State at Day 91 after Week 13 actions
-- Cash after immediate actions/R&D/research is only $298,210 (started from $2.291M, spent $100k market discovery before actions + $1.833M R&D + $60k D_S07 research). Do not panic if day98 cash is much higher; if it is < $0.5M, cut ads/ops/dev temporarily and delay new R&D.
-- Active subs before advancing: 89,556 individuals, $9.185M active row MRR: S2 84.9k subs ($8.68M MRR), S3 4.7k ($0.51M), no enterprise seats. Week 85-91 net cash +$1.60M before new R&D; subscription cash $2.67M, compute $255k, ads $340k, ops $210k, dev $175k, capacity $70k.
-- A2/B4/C5 worked: S2 content $45k/day got 35,485 leads -> 28,041 subs (79% CVR, future avg $139); S2 network 4,196 leads -> 3,339 subs. New cohorts had large B uptake (~1/3 S2, ~45% S3), making B very profitable despite tier4 compute. Cancellations 944 were mostly older cheap cohorts.
-- Usage week 88.2M; day91 16.2M vs tier5 cap 25M, no outage/overload, but social complained about latency and support. Open issues 8,191, mostly day0; small stale tail remains and actual ops API cannot target by customer.
-- Market discovery on day91 found D_E02 Educational Institutions (enterprise, info1) and D_S07 Data Analysts (individual, info1). D_S07 estimates: WTP ~$95 (noisy), usage ~180/day, q_floor ~0.26, cap ~54k, incoming network from S2/S3 is strong. D_S07 level2 research started, expected day94.
+## State at Day 98 after Week 14 actions
+- Cash after actions/R&D is LOW: $601,630 (was $1.435M before actions; spent $833,333 on R&D tiers 2+3). If day105 cash is <~$0.3M, cut ads/ops/dev immediately and do not start R&D.
+- Active subs before advancing: 116,358 individuals, no enterprise, active row MRR $15.085M. S2 108,809 subs / $13.946M MRR; S3 7,540 / $1.139M; D_S07 only 2 active.
+- Week 92-98 net cash before new R&D was +$1.137M from day91 post-action cash. Subscription cash $3.166M, compute $530k, ads $525k, ops $441k, dev $315k, capacity $196k. No outage/overload; peak usage 22.1M/day vs tier6 cap 80M.
+- S2/S3 price+lead-promo worked: 43,455 individual leads -> 32,564 subs despite A/B list prices 149/239 and lead promo 110. S2 content spent $420k -> 32,162 leads -> 26,299 active subs (avg future price $188); S3 old 7k/day ads -> 3,129 ad leads -> 2,544 active. S2 ad lead efficiency is declining as active approaches cap (day96-98 ~43/43/67 leads per $1k vs day92 121), but still profitable.
+- D_S07 ads FAILED at current quality: $56k ads generated 2,543 ad leads plus 696 network leads but only 2 subscribers. Level2 D_S07 estimates WTP $108, q_floor 0.447, usage 207/day, cap 71k. Current A quality 0.379 < q_floor; B quality 0.505 but first price was likely too high. Need more D_S07 quality before paid acquisition.
+- Support/social remains the main reputation risk: open issues 11,411, mostly day0 (S2 10,767/S3 704), but recurrent posts at day98 complained about handoffs/slow integration support. Prior public post got positive reactions, but customers want proof/metrics.
+- Competitor pressure was heavy (social posts day93-96 with ~0.13-0.17 quality boosts). S2/S3 targeted quality is still very high (A quality S2 1.032, S3 0.971), but global/D_S07/enterprise quality is weak.
 
-## Week 13 actions made for Days 92-98
-- Pricing raised for NEW cohorts to A/B/C=$149/$239/$549, with lead promo S2/S3/D_S07=$110 and no ongoing discounts. This keeps proven first-month A/B prices at $39/$129 while lifting future ARPU (A +37%, B +20%). Watch renewal risk later (first affected renewals start around day122).
-- Model tiers kept A2/B4/C5; quotas kept A=20k, B=250k, C=800k to control compute despite quota complaints.
-- Capacity upgraded to tier6 (80M/day, $28k/day) to prevent growth-related latency/overload.
-- Spend now: global ops $35k/day + targeted ops S2 $20k, S3 $7k, D_S07 $1k (total ops $63k/day); global dev $20k + targeted dev S2 $10k, S3 $10k, D_S07 $5k (total dev $45k/day).
-- Ads snapshot now $75k/day: content S2 $60k, S3 $4k, D_S07 $3k; social S3 $3k, D_S07 $1k; search D_S07 $3k; linkedin D_S07 $1k. Ads strength 0.
-- R&D started: tier5 t5_1 cost $833k, completes day121 with LOW sampled boost +0.084; tier6 t6_1 cost $1.0M, completes day140 with HIGH sampled boost +0.556. Plan to start smaller tiers 2/3/4 once cash cushion recovers.
-- Public post 14 replied to post 187: capacity + latency work + expanded support + same-day owner updates + quota/onboarding docs.
+## Week 14 actions made for Days 99-105
+- Kept prices A/B/C=$149/$239/$549; tiers A2/B4/C5; quotas A=20k/B=250k/C=800k; capacity tier6; ads strength 0.
+- Lead promos snapshot: S2=$110, S3=$110, D_S07=$130, all others 0. Ongoing promo snapshot: D_S07=$40 only (so target future D_S07 A ~$109 without discounting S2/S3).
+- Ads snapshot remains $75k/day but reallocated: content S2 $60k; content S3 $8k; social S3 $7k; all D_S07 ads stopped until quality/CVR improves.
+- Ops surge: global ops $35k/day + targeted ops S2 $40k and S3 $15k (total ops $90k/day). Goal: kill stale issues/support handoff complaints; trim only after social and issue ages improve.
+- Dev: global dev $20k/day + targeted dev S2 $10k, S3 $10k, D_S07 $20k (total dev $60k/day). At $20k/day D_S07 raw quality should rise ~0.036/day; A should cross q_floor around day101-102.
+- R&D started: tier2 t2_1 cost $333,333, completes day128, boost +0.0619; tier3 t3_1 cost $500,000, completes day128, boost +0.1023. Existing tier5 t5_1 completes day121 (+0.084 low); tier6 t6_1 completes day140 (+0.556 high).
+- Social post 15 replied to post 208: one named owner per integration ticket, 24h specialist routing, no re-explaining, support surge until backlog age <48h, weekly response-time metrics.
 
-## Strategy / watch on Day 98
-- Primary hypothesis: price+promo move preserves acquisition CVR because first-month A/B prices unchanged, while future ARPU rises; tier6 + higher ops protects reputation; D_S07 becomes the next growth segment as S2 approaches cap.
-- Watch cash first. If day98 cash < $0.5M, immediately reduce S2 content to <=$35k/day, D_S07 tests to <=$3k/day, and delay R&D. If cash >$1.5M with good CVR, start tier2+tier3 R&D; if >$3M also tier4.
-- Watch S2 cap: active S2 84.9k vs noisy cap ~167k. If S2 >140k or ad leads/$ fall hard, taper S2 spend and shift to D_S07/S3/market discovery.
-- Watch D_S07 ad performance by channel and network conversion; if CVR strong and first-month CAC profitable, scale best D_S07 channels. If D_S07 churn/complaints emerge, add targeted dev/consider lower future effective price later.
-- Watch support/social: issue ages >1 day, stale S2/S3 issues, and latency complaints. Ops is now expensive; if still social-negative, keep/high ops; if resolved, can trim after day105.
-- Enterprise: no fresh inbox at day91. D_E02 and D_E09 may get network leads, but do not buy enterprise ads until quality/R&D improves and negotiations appear.
+## Strategy / watch on Day 105
+- Cash first. If day105 cash < $0.3M, cut S2 content to <=$40k/day, S3 ads <=$8k/day, targeted ops to roughly S2 $25k/S3 $8k, D_S07 dev to $10k, and pause R&D/market research. If cash >$2M with healthy acquisition, consider tier4 R&D; if >$4M consider tier7 and/or market discovery.
+- Watch S2 cap and ad efficiency: active 108.8k vs noisy cap 167k. If S2 >140k or content leads/$ collapse below ~30/$1k, taper S2 spend and shift to S3/D_S07/new discovered groups.
+- Watch D_S07: by day105 A quality should be near/above q_floor; network D_S07 leads should start converting if hypothesis is right. If CVR improves, restart small D_S07 tests (prefer search/linkedin first, then content/social) with D_S07 lead promo 130 and ongoing 40. If still near-zero, keep ads off and continue/reassess pricing/quality.
+- Watch support: issue ages >1 day, stale S2/S3 issues, and social posts about handoffs. Keep ops surge if stale issues/social remain; trim only when most issues are resolved <48h and posts turn positive.
+- Enterprise: no fresh inbox at day98. Do not buy enterprise ads until quality/R&D improves and real negotiation threads appear.
 
-## Forecasts planned from Day 91 after actions
-- Day98: point ~$1.8M, 95% CI -$0.2M to $3.5M.
-- Day119: point ~$4.5M, 95% CI $0.5M to $10M (assumes some tier2/3/4 R&D if cash recovers).
-- Day175: point ~$38M, 95% CI $8M to $85M.
-- Day273: point ~$135M, 95% CI $30M to $300M.
+## Forecasts submitted from Day 98 after actions
+- Day105: point ~$1.3M, 95% CI ~$0.0M to $2.6M.
+- Day126: point ~$7.5M, 95% CI ~$1.5M to $17M (assumes some future R&D only if cash recovers).
+- Day182: point ~$45M, 95% CI ~$10M to $100M.
+- Day280: point ~$140M, 95% CI ~$35M to $320M.

files.content:
import novamind_api as nm, json

results={}

def do(name, fn):
    try:
        res=fn()
        results[name]=res
        print(f"\n=== {name} ===")
        print(json.dumps(res, indent=2, default=str)[:5000])
    except Exception as e:
        results[name]={"ERROR":str(e)}
        print(f"\n=== {name} ERROR ===\n{e}")

# Keep core pricing/tier/quotas/capacity unchanged; change promos/spend allocation.
do('lead_promotion', lambda: nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(
    global_promotion=0.0,
    by_group={"S1":0.0,"S2":110.0,"S3":110.0,"E1":0.0,"E2":0.0,"E3":0.0,"D_E09":0.0,"D_E02":0.0,"D_S07":130.0},
    by_channel={},
    by_channel_group={}
))
do('ongoing_promotion', lambda: nm.pricing.set_promotion(
    global_promotion=0.0,
    by_group={"D_S07":40.0},
    by_customer={},
    by_group_plan={}
))
# Stop D_S07 ads until quality crosses its Level-2 q_floor; redeploy dollars to proven S3 channels while keeping S2 engine running.
do('targeted_ads', lambda: nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={
    "content_marketing": {"S2":60000.0, "S3":8000.0},
    "social_media": {"S3":7000.0},
    "search_ads": {},
    "linkedin": {},
    "referral_program": {}
}))
do('daily_spend', lambda: nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=35000.0, development=20000.0))
# More targeted support for the groups causing social/reputation risk; remove D_S07 ops while almost no subscribers.
do('targeted_ops', lambda: nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={"S2":40000.0, "S3":15000.0}))
# Keep S2/S3 quality compounding against competitor launches; accelerate D_S07 until A crosses q_floor.
do('targeted_dev', lambda: nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={"S2":10000.0, "S3":10000.0, "D_S07":20000.0}))
do('ads_strength', lambda: nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.0, by_group={}))
# Start near-term R&D projects now that weekly cashflow is positive; tier2/tier3 should complete around the day121 renewal/RAG window.
do('start_research_tier2', lambda: nm.research.start_research_project(tier=2))
do('start_research_tier3', lambda: nm.research.start_research_project(tier=3))
# Public accountability response to the newest support complaints.
post = "You're right: handoffs are the bug. Starting today every integration ticket gets one named owner, 24h specialist routing, no re-explaining, and a support surge until backlog age is <48h. We'll publish weekly response-time metrics."
do('social_reply_208', lambda: nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=post, reply_to_post_id=208))
# Summarize key post-action state.
do('cash_after_actions', lambda: nm.query('SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) AS cash FROM ledger')["rows"])
do('research_projects_after', lambda: nm.query('SELECT * FROM research_projects ORDER BY started_day DESC,tier')["rows"])
print('\nALL_RESULTS_JSON')
print(json.dumps(results, indent=2, default=str))

import novamind_api as nm
sql='''
SELECT s.start_day, c.group_id, s.plan, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),1) avg_price,
SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) active,
SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) cancelled,
SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='lost' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) lost,
COUNT(*) total_rows
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
WHERE s.start_day BETWEEN 62 AND 98 AND c.group_id IN ('S2','S3')
GROUP BY s.start_day,c.group_id,s.plan
ORDER BY s.start_day,c.group_id,s.plan
'''
rows=nm.query(sql)['rows']
print('day,grp,plan,avg_price,active,cancelled,lost,total,retention_active_over_subscribed')
for r in rows:
    if r['start_day']<=75 or r['start_day']>=92:
        sub_total=(r['active'] or 0)+(r['cancelled'] or 0)
        ret=(r['active'] or 0)/sub_total if sub_total else None
        print(f"{r['start_day']},{r['group_id']},{r['plan']},{r['avg_price']},{r['active']},{r['cancelled']},{r['lost']},{r['total_rows']},{'' if ret is None else round(ret,3)}")

import novamind_api as nm, math, json, copy
cur=nm.vars.current_day
cash=float(nm.query('SELECT SUM(amount) cash FROM ledger')['rows'][0]['cash'])
rows=nm.query("SELECT billing_day_mod30 mod, COUNT(*) n, SUM(effective_price*seat_count) amt FROM subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed' GROUP BY billing_day_mod30")['rows']
cohorts=[{'mod':int(r['mod']),'count':float(r['n']),'amt':float(r['amt'] or 0)} for r in rows]
cnts={r['group_id']:float(r['n']) for r in nm.query("SELECT c.group_id, COUNT(*) n FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id WHERE s.status='subscribed' GROUP BY c.group_id")['rows']}
print('start',cur,cash,cnts,'mrr',sum(c['amt'] for c in cohorts))

# Calibrated for day98 after actions. This is approximate: cash at horizons includes future planned actions at days >98, not actions on exact horizon day.
def simulate(params):
    cash0=cash
    cohorts0=[c.copy() for c in cohorts]
    S2=cnts.get('S2',0.0); S3=cnts.get('S3',0.0); DS7=cnts.get('D_S07',0.0); S1=cnts.get('S1',0.0)
    out=[]; weekacc={}
    for d in range(cur+1,cur+183):
        t=d-cur
        capS2=params['capS2']; capS3=params['capS3']; capDS7=params['capDS7']
        # Ad policy: current week fixed (S2 60k, S3 15k, DS7 0). Later taper S2 near cap, test/scale D_S07 after quality ramp.
        if t<=7:
            s2_spend=60000.0; s3_spend=15000.0; ds7_spend=0.0
        else:
            if S2 < params['s2_taper1']:
                s2_spend=params['s2_full_spend']
            elif S2 < params['s2_taper2']:
                s2_spend=params['s2_mid_spend']
            else:
                s2_spend=params['s2_low_spend']
            s3_spend=params['s3_spend'] if S3 < capS3*0.85 else params['s3_low_spend']
            if t < params['ds7_start_day'] or DS7 > capDS7*0.85:
                ds7_spend=0.0 if t < params['ds7_start_day'] else params['ds7_low_spend']
            else:
                ds7_spend=params['ds7_spend']
        ad_spend=s2_spend+s3_spend+ds7_spend
        # Ops/dev schedule; current surge first two weeks, then normalize if social improves.
        if t<=14:
            ops=params['ops_early']; dev=params['dev_early']
        elif t<=42:
            ops=params['ops_mid']; dev=params['dev_mid']
        else:
            ops=params['ops_late']; dev=params['dev_late']
        # Saturation/reputation. cap_power <1 means cap reduces lead flow gradually.
        capfac2=max(0.02,1-S2/capS2)**params['cap_power']
        capfac3=max(0.04,1-S3/capS3)**params['cap_power']
        capfac7=max(0.04,1-DS7/capDS7)**params['cap_power']
        ref2=max(0.02,1-108809/params['capS2'])**params['cap_power']
        ref3=max(0.04,1-7540/params['capS3'])**params['cap_power']
        ref7=max(0.04,1-2/params['capDS7'])**params['cap_power']
        # Base leads/day at day98 conditions: S2 60k content recent avg; S3 15k from observed social/content; D_S07 if/when quality ready.
        s2_ad=params['s2_base_leads_60k']*((s2_spend/60000.0)**params['ad_elastic'])*(capfac2/ref2)*params['rep_mult'] if s2_spend>0 else 0
        s3_ad=params['s3_base_leads_15k']*((s3_spend/15000.0)**params['ad_elastic'])*(capfac3/ref3)*params['rep_mult'] if s3_spend>0 else 0
        ds7_ad=params['ds7_base_leads']*((ds7_spend/8000.0)**params['ad_elastic'])*(capfac7/ref7)*params['rep_mult'] if ds7_spend>0 else 0
        # Network effects from insights/observed; cap-limited and reputation-sensitive.
        s2_net=(0.0060*S2 + 0.0010*S3 + 0.0012*DS7)*capfac2/ref2*params['net_mult']
        s3_net=(0.0007*S2 + 0.0012*S3 + 0.0025*DS7)*capfac3/ref3*params['net_mult']
        ds7_net=(0.0020*S2 + 0.0035*S3 + 0.0008*DS7)*capfac7/ref7*params['net_mult']
        s2_leads=max(0,s2_ad+s2_net); s3_leads=max(0,s3_ad+s3_net); ds7_leads=max(0,ds7_ad+ds7_net)
        # D_S07 CVR ramps as targeted dev crosses q_floor (faster in point/high).
        ds7_cvr=params['ds7_cvr_pre'] if t<params['ds7_quality_day'] else params['ds7_cvr']
        s2_sub=s2_leads*params['s2_cvr']; s3_sub=s3_leads*params['s3_cvr']; ds7_sub=ds7_leads*ds7_cvr
        # First-month cash after lead promos; row MRR is future list/ongoing-promo price.
        first=s2_sub*params['s2_first'] + s3_sub*params['s3_first'] + ds7_sub*params['ds7_first']
        new_mrr=s2_sub*params['s2_mrr'] + s3_sub*params['s3_mrr'] + ds7_sub*params['ds7_mrr']
        new_count=s2_sub+s3_sub+ds7_sub
        # Renewals. bill_loss proxies cancellations/downgrades before payment; reduce cohort MRR at billing.
        renew=0.0
        for c in cohorts0:
            if d%30==c['mod']:
                renew += c['amt']*(1-params['bill_loss'])
                c['count'] *= (1-params['monthly_churn'])
                c['amt'] *= (1-params['monthly_churn'])
        cohorts0.append({'mod':d%30,'count':new_count,'amt':new_mrr})
        S2=S2*(1-params['daily_decay'])+s2_sub
        S3=S3*(1-params['daily_decay'])+s3_sub
        DS7=DS7*(1-params['daily_decay_ds7'])+ds7_sub
        S1=S1*(1-params['daily_decay'])
        usage=(S2*190 + S3*430 + DS7*210)*params['usage_mult']
        capcost=28000.0 if usage <= 80_000_000 else 75000.0
        # Current compute calibration: about $0.68 per active S2/week? Actually use daily per-subscriber dollars.
        compute=(S2*0.63 + S3*1.55 + DS7*0.45)*params['usage_mult']
        lead_cost=0.5*(s2_leads+s3_leads+ds7_leads)
        # Future discretionary actions: include only if day is before a forecast horizon, not exact horizon unless actual future week would spend before then.
        rd=params.get('rd_days',{}).get(d,0.0)
        market=params.get('market_days',{}).get(d,0.0)
        costs=ad_spend+ops+dev+capcost+compute+lead_cost+rd+market
        cash0 += first+renew-costs
        if t in [7,28,84,182]:
            out.append({'t':t,'day':d,'cash':cash0,'active':S2+S3+DS7+S1,'S2':S2,'S3':S3,'D_S07':DS7,'mrr':sum(c['amt'] for c in cohorts0),'first':first,'renew':renew,'costs':costs,'rd':rd,'ads':ad_spend,'ops':ops,'dev':dev,'compute':compute,'new':new_count})
    return out

# point: cautious future reinvestment after cash recovers, no action at exact day126 horizon.
point=dict(capS2=175000.0,capS3=68000.0,capDS7=72000.0,cap_power=0.75,ad_elastic=0.85,rep_mult=1.0,net_mult=1.0,
           s2_base_leads_60k=3300.0,s3_base_leads_15k=930.0,ds7_base_leads=500.0,
           s2_cvr=0.80,s3_cvr=0.82,ds7_cvr_pre=0.05,ds7_cvr=0.62,ds7_quality_day=6,
           s2_first=78.0,s3_first=94.0,ds7_first=62.0,s2_mrr=188.0,s3_mrr=205.0,ds7_mrr=115.0,
           monthly_churn=0.07,bill_loss=0.06,daily_decay=0.07/30,daily_decay_ds7=0.09/30,usage_mult=1.10,
           ops_early=90000.0,dev_early=60000.0,ops_mid=75000.0,dev_mid=55000.0,ops_late=50000.0,dev_late=40000.0,
           s2_full_spend=60000.0,s2_mid_spend=35000.0,s2_low_spend=10000.0,s2_taper1=140000.0,s2_taper2=165000.0,
           s3_spend=18000.0,s3_low_spend=6000.0,ds7_start_day=10,ds7_spend=8000.0,ds7_low_spend=3000.0,
           rd_days={112:666667,119:1166667,140:1333333,154:1500000,168:1666667},
           market_days={112:100000,126:100000,140:100000})
low=dict(point)
low.update(capS2=145000.0,capS3=50000.0,capDS7=45000.0,cap_power=1.15,ad_elastic=0.65,rep_mult=0.65,net_mult=0.60,
           s2_base_leads_60k=2300.0,s3_base_leads_15k=650.0,ds7_base_leads=180.0,
           s2_cvr=0.62,s3_cvr=0.65,ds7_cvr_pre=0.0,ds7_cvr=0.25,ds7_quality_day=10,
           s2_first=68.0,s3_first=80.0,ds7_first=45.0,s2_mrr=155.0,s3_mrr=165.0,ds7_mrr=85.0,
           monthly_churn=0.14,bill_loss=0.16,daily_decay=0.14/30,daily_decay_ds7=0.18/30,usage_mult=1.45,
           ops_early=90000.0,dev_early=60000.0,ops_mid=85000.0,dev_mid=50000.0,ops_late=55000.0,dev_late=35000.0,
           s2_mid_spend=25000.0,s2_low_spend=5000.0,s2_taper1=120000.0,s2_taper2=138000.0,
           s3_spend=10000.0,s3_low_spend=3000.0,ds7_start_day=21,ds7_spend=3000.0,ds7_low_spend=1000.0,
           rd_days={119:666667}, market_days={})
high=dict(point)
